steps.title: Compare the medians
steps.content: Each dot plot has $21$ values, so the median is the $11$th value. Counting each plot shows the $11$th value is $7$ for both data sets, so statement I is true.

steps.title: Compare the spreads
steps.content:
Standard deviation measures spread. Both sets are centered at $7$, but their squared distances from $7$ are different.
$$\text{Set A total}=50$$
$$\text{Set B total}=68$$
So statement II is false.

steps.title: Choose the true statement
steps.content: Only statement I must be true. The answer is B.
